name: Kente Print Shirt
description: Men's vibrant authentic kente print shirt, handwoven in Ghana. Bold geometric patterns that tell a story.
details: Available in sizes S through XXL. Made from 100% authentic Ghanaian kente cloth. Hand-loomed by skilled artisans in the Ashanti region. Each piece is unique due to the handwoven nature of the fabric. Machine wash cold, lay flat to dry.

name: Kente Wrap Dress
description: Elegant women's wrap dress in traditional kente fabric. Striking colors, flowy silhouette for any occasion.
details: One-size-fits-most wrap style with adjustable tie. Premium kente fabric sourced from Kumasi, Ghana. Perfect for formal events, celebrations, or everyday wear. Dry clean recommended.

name: Kente Dashiki
description: Classic Ghanaian dashiki in rich kente patterns. Unisex cut, perfect for everyday wear or special occasions.
details: Loose, relaxed fit suits all body types. Authentic kente fabric with traditional Ashanti geometric patterns. Available in multiple sizes. Pull-over style with V-neck. Hand wash cold.

name: Kente Bow Tie & Pocket Square Set
description: Matching bow tie and pocket square handcrafted from authentic kente cloth. A statement accessory.
details: Pre-tied adjustable bow tie fits collar sizes 14" to 18". Matching pocket square 10"x10". Crafted from the same kente fabric for a perfect match. Ideal gift for weddings, graduations, and formal events.

name: Kelewele Spice Mix
description: Traditional Ghanaian seasoning for spiced fried plantains. Bold ginger and pepper blend. 4 oz.
details: Authentic Ghanaian recipe featuring ginger, anise, cloves, and Scotch bonnet pepper. Simply coat sliced ripe plantains in the spice mix and fry until golden. Makes approximately 4 servings. No artificial preservatives. Store in a cool, dry place.

name: Shito Pepper Sauce
description: Ghana's beloved hot black pepper sauce — rich, smoky, and deeply savory. 8 oz jar.
details: Handcrafted in small batches using dried shrimp, smoked herrings, scotch bonnet peppers, and onions slow-cooked in vegetable oil. Pairs with rice, bread, grilled fish, and more. Refrigerate after opening. Contains shellfish and fish.

name: Groundnut Paste
description: Authentic Ghanaian peanut butter — smooth, natural, no additives. Straight from the source. 12 oz jar.
details: Stone-ground from West African groundnuts with just a pinch of salt. No added sugars, oils, or preservatives. Richer and more intensely nutty than conventional peanut butter. Use in groundnut soup, as a spread, or eat straight from the jar. Refrigerate after opening.

name: Plantain Chips
description: Crispy sun-dried plantain chips, lightly salted. A West African classic snack. 6 oz bag.
details: Sliced from ripe green plantains, lightly salted and sun-dried for a satisfying crunch. No artificial flavors, colors, or preservatives. Gluten-free and vegan. Perfect on-the-go snack. Made in Ghana, shipped fresh.
